title: CMHO Rajnandgaon – MPW, Nursing officer/ Staff Nurse and More – 332 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CMHO Rajnandgaon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 332 MPW, Nursing officer/ Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Chief Medical & Health Office Rajnandgaon has released the CMHO Rajnandgaon Recruitment notification for 332 MPW, Nursing officer/ Staff Nurse and More vacancies across various categories. The application process begins on May 15, 2026 and will close on May 29, 2026. Selected candidates are paid a monthly honorarium ranging from ₹8,860 to ₹25,000.
basic_details.post_name: MPW, Nursing officer/ Staff Nurse and More – 332 Posts

qualification.education_qualification: B.Com, B.Sc, 12TH, 10TH, BAMS, BUMS, BPT, BHMS, Any Post Graduate, M.Com, PG Diploma

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online registration process as follows:
